holdings.infoBox: IEMG is an equity ETF with a total of 2864 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 12.95%, Samsung Electronics at 7.42%, SK hynix at 6.90%, Tencent Holdings at 2.32%, and Alibaba Group Holding at 1.37%.

overview.description: The iShares Core MSCI Emerging Markets ETF (IEMG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Emerging Markets IMI index, a market-cap-weighted index of emerging-market firms, covering 99% of market capitalization. IEMG was launched on Oct 18, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.
